title: Cyclic Dungeons
description: Smart dungeons for the avid adventurer
body:
Tired of dungeons that are just a singular repetitive room or a series of rooms randomly connected together? Desiring a more diverse experience with a bit more sense to its progression?

Cyclic Dungeons aims to combine several procedural generation principles to create dungeons that are aesthetic, complex, and deliberately engineered for engaging gameplay.

Every dungeon starts out as a "sentence" that is then rewritten by grammar rules, turned into a structural layout, and generated into the world as a series of individual rooms built from a predefined 2x2x2 tile set appropriate to its function and theme. This ensures that each dungeon and even each room is a unique experience, whilst still being reasonably sensible.
